You can learn more about the FIO protocol and how to use it within your Edge account, here:

https://edge.app/blog/tips-and-tutorials/edge-fio-one-identity-for-all-your-crypto


If you have more questions about it, please reply here afterwards. We'll be happy to assist you with it getting it set up.
